dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.content: Your central overview. View system health, container status, and key metrics at a glance.

observability.title: Observability
observability.content: Monitor request logs, latency, token usage, and error rates across all LLM providers.

containers.title: Containers
containers.content: Manage the Docker containers that make up your llm.port deployment. Start, stop, and view logs.

llm.title: LLM Providers
llm.content: Configure upstream LLM endpoints — local Ollama, OpenAI, Azure, or any OpenAI-compatible API.

utilities.title: Utilities
utilities.content: Node fleet management, scheduler, and system utilities for multi-node setups.

access_control.title: Access Control
access_control.content: Manage users, API keys, roles, and authentication providers for your deployment.

pii.title: PII Guard
pii.content: Scan and redact personally identifiable information from prompts and responses before they reach LLMs.

rag.title: RAG (Knowledge Base)
rag.content: Upload documents and build a retrieval-augmented generation pipeline for grounded responses.

chat.title: Chat Workspace
chat.content: Manage chat projects, conversation history, and model assignments. To start chatting, use the Chat button in the top bar.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.content: Browse and manage MCP servers, skill plugins, and other extensions that enhance llm.port.

settings.title: Settings
settings.content: System-wide configuration including networking, storage, security policies, and feature flags.

help.title: Help & Guides
help.content: Access this product tour, guided setup, and documentation whenever you need a refresher.

providers.title: Add a Provider
providers.content: Start by adding at least one LLM provider. Point to a local Ollama instance or paste an API key for a cloud provider.

chat.title: Create a Chat Project
chat.content: Create and manage chat projects, sessions, and history here. To start chatting, click the Chat button in the top bar.

pii.title: Review PII Settings
pii.content: PII Guard is enabled by default. Review the dashboard to see detection stats and configure which entity types to redact.

rag.title: Upload Documents
rag.content: Go to the Knowledge Base and upload your first document. RAG will index it for retrieval-augmented answers.

providers.title: Configure Providers
providers.content: Set up shared LLM endpoints for your team — local servers, cloud APIs, or a mix of both.

nodes.title: Register Nodes
nodes.content: Add your team's GPU nodes so the scheduler can distribute inference workloads.

access.title: Set Up Users
access.content: Create team accounts or connect your identity provider. Assign roles to control who can manage resources.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.content: Register MCP tool servers so team members can invoke external capabilities from their chat sessions.

chat.title: Create Shared Projects
chat.content: Set up chat projects that your team can collaborate in. Control model access per project.

pii.title: Configure PII Policies
pii.content: Define PII redaction rules that apply to all team members to protect sensitive data.

rag.title: Build a Knowledge Base
rag.content: Upload team documents to the shared knowledge base. All members can query them for grounded answers.

access.title: Access Control & SSO
access.content: Start with access control. Connect your identity provider, define roles, and set up API key policies.

providers.title: Provider Fleet
providers.content: Register your approved LLM endpoints. Set rate limits, cost budgets, and failover routing.

nodes.title: Node Fleet
nodes.content: Register GPU nodes and configure scheduling policies for workload distribution.

pii.title: PII Compliance
pii.content: Configure enterprise PII policies — entity types, redaction modes, audit logging, and compliance reporting.

observability.title: Observability & Audit
observability.content: Set up monitoring dashboards, audit trails, and alerting for compliance and operational visibility.

mcp.title: Extension Governance
mcp.content: Approve and manage MCP tool servers. Control which extensions are available to each role.

rag.title: Enterprise Knowledge Base
rag.content: Upload corporate documents with access controls. Configure indexing pipelines and retrieval policies.

chat.title: Governed Chat Workspace
chat.content: Create project templates with policy guardrails, model allowlists, and PII enforcement per workspace.

unknown.title: About This Page
unknown.description: No specific help is available for this page yet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Your central overview of the llm.port deployment. See system health, container status, resource usage, and key metrics at a glance.
dashboard.action_health: Check system health and service availability
dashboard.action_containers: View running container counts and statuses
dashboard.action_metrics: Monitor resource usage and performance metrics

containers.title: Containers
containers.description: List and manage all Docker containers in your deployment. Start, stop, restart, or inspect individual containers.
containers.action_list: Browse all containers with status filters
containers.action_create: Create a new container from an image

create_container.title: Create Container
create_container.description: Launch a new Docker container by selecting an image and configuring ports, volumes, and environment variables.
create_container.action_image: Choose a base image for the new container

container_detail.title: Container Detail
container_detail.description: Inspect a specific container — view its logs, resource usage, environment variables, and network settings.

images.title: Images
images.description: Manage Docker images available for container creation. Pull new images or remove unused ones.
images.action_pull: Pull new images from a registry

networks.title: Networks
networks.description: View and manage Docker networks. Inspect connected containers and create custom networks.
networks.action_inspect: Inspect network configuration and connected containers

stacks.title: Stacks
stacks.description: Manage Docker Compose stacks — groups of related containers deployed together.

observability.title: Cost Observability
observability.description: Monitor LLM usage costs, request latency, token consumption, and error rates across all providers.
observability.action_cost: Track cost per provider and model
observability.action_tokens: Monitor token usage trends over time

logs.title: Logs & Audit
logs.description: Browse system logs and audit trails. Filter by severity, source, or time range.
logs.action_filter: Filter logs by level, source, or keyword
logs.action_audit: Switch to the audit trail for security events

security_map.title: Security Map
security_map.description: Visualize data residency and security boundaries. See where your data flows across providers and regions.
security_map.action_residency: View data residency map by provider

providers.title: LLM Providers
providers.description: Configure upstream LLM endpoints — local Ollama servers, OpenAI, Azure, or any OpenAI-compatible API. Test connectivity and manage credentials.
providers.action_add: Add a new LLM provider endpoint
providers.action_route: Configure request routing and failover rules

models.title: Models
models.description: Browse models available across all configured providers. Pull new models to local runtimes or assign models to projects.
models.action_pull: Pull a model to a local Ollama runtime
models.action_assign: Assign models to chat projects or endpoints

model_detail.title: Model Detail
model_detail.description: View detailed information about a specific model — parameters, capabilities, and usage statistics.
model_detail.action_test: Send a test prompt to this model

runtimes.title: Runtimes
runtimes.description: View local LLM runtimes (e.g., Ollama instances) and their loaded models. Check health and GPU utilization.
runtimes.action_health: Check runtime health and loaded models

runtime_detail.title: Runtime Detail
runtime_detail.description: Inspect a specific runtime — its configuration, loaded models, and resource usage.
runtime_detail.action_models: See which models are loaded on this runtime

agent_trace.title: Agent Trace
agent_trace.description: Inspect LLM call traces — see the full request/response chain including tool calls, reasoning steps, and token usage.

endpoint.title: API Endpoint
endpoint.description: Interactive API documentation for the llm.port OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Test API calls directly from the browser.
endpoint.action_test: Send test requests to the endpoint

nodes.title: Node Fleet
nodes.description: Manage your fleet of GPU inference nodes. Enroll new nodes, monitor health, and configure scheduling priorities.
nodes.action_monitor: Monitor node health and GPU utilization

node_detail.title: Node Detail
node_detail.description: Inspect a specific node — hardware info, loaded models, running jobs, and health history.
node_detail.action_status: View node status and hardware details
node_detail.action_drain: Drain or cordon the node for maintenance

node_profiles.title: Node Profiles
node_profiles.description: Define reusable node profiles that specify resource requirements and scheduling constraints for workloads.
node_profiles.action_assign: Assign profiles to nodes or workloads

scheduler.title: Scheduler
scheduler.description: View and manage the inference job queue. Set scheduling policies and monitor job distribution across nodes.
scheduler.action_queue: Browse the job queue and job history

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage user accounts, assign roles, and generate API keys. Control who can access the system and what they can do.

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Define roles with granular permissions. Roles control access to resources, actions, and API endpoints.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Organize users into groups for bulk role assignment and access management.

auth_providers.title: Auth Providers
auth_providers.description: Configure external authentication providers — OIDC, SAML, or LDAP — for single sign-on (SSO).

pii_dashboard.title: PII Dashboard
pii_dashboard.description: Overview of PII scanning activity — detection counts by entity type, redaction rates, and policy compliance.

pii_activity.title: PII Activity Log
pii_activity.description: Detailed log of PII detections and redactions. Filter by entity type, user, or time range.
pii_activity.action_filter: Filter activity by entity type or user

pii_policies.title: PII Policies
pii_policies.description: Define tenant-level PII policies — which entity types to detect, redaction modes, and enforcement rules.

rag_knowledge_base.title: Knowledge Base
rag_knowledge_base.description: Upload and manage documents for retrieval-augmented generation. Documents are indexed for semantic search.
rag_knowledge_base.action_upload: Upload new documents to the knowledge base
rag_knowledge_base.action_search: Test search queries against the index

rag_documents.title: Documents
rag_documents.description: Browse and manage individual documents in the RAG pipeline. View indexing status and metadata.

rag_collections.title: Collections
rag_collections.description: Organize documents into collections for scoped retrieval. Each collection has its own embedding index.

rag_runtime.title: RAG Runtime
rag_runtime.description: Configure the RAG pipeline runtime — embedding models, chunk sizes, retrieval parameters, and vector store settings.

rag_collectors.title: Collectors
rag_collectors.description: Configure data collectors that automatically ingest documents from external sources on a schedule.

rag_explorer.title: RAG Explorer
rag_explorer.description: Interactively explore the RAG index — query chunks, inspect embeddings, and debug retrieval quality.
rag_explorer.action_chunks: Inspect individual chunks and their scores

rag_publishes.title: Publishes
rag_publishes.description: Manage published RAG snapshots. Publishing freezes a collection version for stable retrieval.

rag_search.title: RAG Search
rag_search.description: Test retrieval queries against published collections. Compare results across collections and parameters.

chat_projects.title: Chat Projects
chat_projects.description: Create and manage chat projects. Each project scopes model access, system prompts, and user permissions.

chat_sessions.title: Chat Sessions
chat_sessions.description: Browse chat sessions across all projects. View conversation history and usage statistics.

chat_attachments.title: Chat Attachments
chat_attachments.description: Manage file attachments uploaded during chat sessions. Review storage usage and clean up old files.
chat_attachments.action_clean: Clean up orphaned or expired files

mcp_servers.title: MCP Servers
mcp_servers.description: Register and manage MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool servers. Each server exposes tools that LLMs can invoke.
mcp_servers.action_health: Check server health and available tools

mcp_detail.title: MCP Server Detail
mcp_detail.description: Inspect a specific MCP server — available tools, configuration, connection status, and usage logs.
mcp_detail.action_tools: Browse available tools and their schemas

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Browse and manage skill plugins — reusable prompt chains and tool compositions that extend LLM capabilities.

skills_create.title: Create Skill
skills_create.description: Define a new skill by specifying its prompt template, required tools, and input/output schema.
skills_create.action_define: Define the skill prompt and parameters
skills_create.action_test: Test the skill with sample inputs

skill_detail.title: Skill Detail
skill_detail.description: Inspect and edit a specific skill — its prompt template, tool bindings, and execution history.
skill_detail.action_test: Run the skill with test inputs

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: System-wide configuration — networking, storage backends, security policies, feature flags, and service parameters.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: View and edit your account information — display name, email, password, and personal preferences.
profile.action_info: Update your display name and email
